jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ECIL
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
